text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh heck, look at the time! I've gotta head to
training right awaвҖ”

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: There are sooo many cute clothes here!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Every piece just screams meвҖ”perfect for a cute Umadol style! вҳҶ

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Like this long frilly skirt... and this oversized knit
dress...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And this reversible blouse looks like it would go
great with plenty of outfits!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: They're all so pretty! My heart is just leaping!

text_block_list.name: Shop Staff
text_block_list.text: Hello! Feel free to try anything on!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, all right! вҳҶ Now, let's see... Which one
should I try on first? вҷӘ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...And that's how Smart Falcon completely forgets
about training.
